specific_question: What is the biggest complaint from the sales representatives at MediConn Solutions?
answer: According to a survey conducted by MediConn Solutions' financial department in September 2024, 70% of sales representatives reported that their biggest complaint was being required to spend a significant amount of time on non-sales related task.
dr_question: According to an article in WTT Solutions from March 2025, Customer Relationship Management (CRM) software is trending. What kind of business data can this software analyze, which would aid in the growth of Mediconn Solutions' virtual healthcare clientele going into the year 2026?
